payload.description: Staging/main currently have two deployment triggers: Amplify auto-build starts immediately on push, while GitHub Actions later builds/pushes the ConsoleRunWorker image, updates Amplify CONSOLE_WORKER_IMAGE_URI, and starts a RELEASE job. This creates stale-image races. Separately, Lambda UpdateFunctionCode currently returns AccessDeniedException/UnknownError for no-op same-code updates on both ConsoleChatResponder image Lambda and AmplifyBranchLinker zip Lambda in account 695039645615. Evidence: Amplify jobs 126/127/128 failed on Lambda 403; job 129 succeeded only after pinning staging CONSOLE_WORKER_IMAGE_URI to already-deployed sha256:503909... so no Lambda code update was required. Need decide one deployment path, likely disable Amplify auto-build for staging/main and let GitHub Actions trigger release only after image publish, then resolve AWS Lambda update 403 with AWS Support/request IDs or account policy fix.
payload.title: Fix staging/main Amplify console worker deployment race and Lambda update 403
